meaning: 側腹亞科的一種類似蜥蜴的小型兩棲動物，成年後生活在水中。
sentences: The term newt refers to a small lizard-like amphibian in the subfamily Pleurodelinae that lives in the water as an adult. 蠑螈一詞指的是側蠑螈亞科中的一種小型蜥蜴狀兩棲動物，成年後生活在水中。
The lesson introduced newt as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了蠑螈這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種由水果醬和糕點麵團包裹而成的餅乾。
sentences: The term newton refers to a cookie consisting of fruit paste in a sheath of pastry dough. 術語「牛頓」指的是一種由水果醬和糕點麵團包裹而成的餅乾。
The lesson introduced newton as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了牛頓這個易於理解的有用術語。
The next bus to the airport will arrive in ten minutes. 下一班去機場的公車將在十分鐘後到達。
I'm looking forward to our trip to Japan next summer. 我期待我們明年夏天的日本之旅。

meaning: 快速小口地咬一口或幾口（某物）。
sentences: The rabbit nibbled the lettuce. 兔子啃了一口生菜。
Before he realized it, he had nibbled his way through a whole bag of potato chips. 等他意識到的時候，他已經啃完了一整袋薯片。
It's a nice day for a walk in the countryside. 真是個適合在鄉間散步的好日子。
He is a very nice person who is always willing to help others. 他是個非常友善的人，總是樂於助人。

meaning: 恰恰;具有敏銳的洞察力或判斷力。
sentences: If someone acts nicely, they do so in a way that is precisely; with fine discernment or judgement. 如果一個人表現得很好，那麼他的行為方式就是正確的；具有敏銳的洞察力或判斷力。
The speaker responded nicely during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了很好的回應。

meaning: 與利基市場相關或旨在利基市場；具有特定的吸引力；朦朧。
sentences: niche products 利基產品
niche audience 小眾受眾

meaning: 表面上的小切口。被視為標記有刻痕的特定地點或點；確切的點或關鍵時刻。
sentences: in the nick of time 在千鈞一髮之際
The term nick refers to a small cut in a surface. A particular place or point considered as marked by a nick; the exact point or critical moment. 術語“刻痕”是指表面上的小切口。被視為標記有刻痕的特定地點或點；確切的點或關鍵時刻。
The new coins are made of a durable mixture of copper and nickel. 新硬幣是由銅和鎳的耐用混合物製成的。
He gave the small child a nickel to buy a cookie at the local bakery. 他給了那個小孩一個五分鎳幣去當地麵包店買餅乾。

meaning: Nickelodeon 的替代字母大小寫形式。
sentences: The term nickelodeon refers to alternative letter-case form of Nickelodeon. Nickelodeon 一詞是指 Nickelodeon 的替代字母大小寫形式。
The lesson introduced nickelodeon as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 Nickodeon 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Most of my close friends address me by my childhood nickname. 我的大多數好友都用我童年的暱稱稱呼我。
He was given the nickname 'The King' due to his exceptional skills. 由於他卓越的技能，他被賦予了「王者」的綽號。

meaning: 一種生物鹼 (C10H14N2)，常見於菸草植物中。
sentences: She is addicted to nicotine. 她對尼古丁上癮了。
The term nicotine refers to an alkaloid (C10H14N2), commonly occurring in the tobacco plant. 尼古丁一詞是指一種生物鹼 (C10H14N2)，通常存在於菸草植物中。
My niece is a very talented student who loves painting. 我的姪女是一位非常有才華、喜愛繪畫的學生。
I bought a cute little dress for my niece's birthday gift. 我為姪女的生日禮物買了一件可愛的小洋裝。

meaning: 善良，聰明；有用或有益，通常以令人印象深刻的聰明方式。
sentences: a nifty trick for reducing your household energy bill 減少家庭能源費用的絕妙技巧
Something described as nifty is good, smart; useful or beneficial, often in an impressively clever way. 被形容為「niquety」的東西是好的、聰明的；有用或有益，通常以令人印象深刻的聰明方式。

meaning: 一個黑人；非洲黑人後裔。
sentences: The term nigger refers to a black person; a person of black African descent. 黑鬼一詞指的是黑人；非洲黑人後裔。
The lesson introduced nigger as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「黑鬼」這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
The end is nigh! 末日已近！
Daybreak is drawing nigh. 黎明即將來臨。
I usually go to bed at 11:00 p.m. every night. 我通常每晚十一點上床睡覺。
The stars were shining brightly in the clear night sky. 星星在晴朗的夜空中閃爍。
She wore a soft cotton nightdress to bed. 她穿著一件柔軟的棉質睡衣睡覺。
She bought a beautiful silk nightdress for her holiday. 她為假期買了一件漂亮的絲綢睡袍。
at nightfall 夜幕降臨時
The term nightfall refers to the close of the day; the coming of night. 「黃昏」一詞是指一天結束時的意思。夜晚的來臨。

meaning: Luscinia megarhynchos 是一種歐亞和非洲鳴禽，鶲科，以其美妙的夜間歌聲而聞名；一隻普通的夜鶯。
sentences: The term nightingale refers to a Eurasian and African songbird, Luscinia megarhynchos, family Muscicapidae, famed for its beautiful singing at night; a common nightingale. 夜鶯一詞指的是一種歐亞和非洲的鳴禽，Luscinia megarhynchos，鶲科，以其在夜間美妙的歌聲而聞名；一隻普通的夜鶯。
The lesson introduced nightingale as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了夜鶯這個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 發生或出現在夜間；夜間;夜間活動的。
sentences: nightly dews 夜間露水
Something described as nightly is happening or appearing in the night; night-time; nocturnal. 被描述為夜間的事情正在夜間發生或出現；夜間;夜。
The car accident was a terrible nightmare that she can't forget. 那場車禍是她無法忘記的一場可怕噩夢。
Living in such poor conditions managed to be a complete nightmare. 生活在如此惡劣的條件下竟然成了一場十足的噩夢。
I work nights, my brother only afternoons, and my son days. 我晚上工作，我哥哥只在下午工作，我兒子則白天工作。
The team responded nights to the change. 該團隊連夜對這一變化做出了反應。
He prefers to wear a comfortable nightshirt for sleeping. 他睡覺時喜歡穿件舒適的長睡衫。
The nightshirt was made of high-quality linen. 這件長睡衫是由高品質亞麻製成的。

meaning: 日落和日出之間的黑暗時間；晚上。
sentences: The term nighttime refers to the hours of darkness between sunset and sunrise; the night. 夜間一詞是指日落和日出之間的黑暗時間；那個晚上。
The lesson introduced nighttime as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了夜間作為一個需要理解的有用術語。
Monkeys are very nimble and can climb trees easily. 猴子非常敏捷，可以輕鬆爬樹。
He has nimble fingers and is a very good pianist. 他手指靈活，是個非常出色的鋼琴家。
The child is nine years old today. 這孩子今天九歲了。
There are nine players on a baseball team. 棒球隊有九名球員。
Something described as nineteenth is the ordinal form of the number nineteen. 被描述為第十九的東西是數字十九的序數形式。
The word nineteenth is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 第十九這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
My grandmother is celebrating her ninetieth birthday next week. 我祖母下週慶祝她的九十歲生日。
The project was completed in ninety days. 該專案在九十天內完工了。
Something described as ninth is the ordinal form of the number nine. 被描述為“第九”的東西是數字“九”的序數形式。
The word ninth is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 第九這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。
Proper hygiene is essential for cleaning baby bottle nipples. 清潔嬰兒奶瓶奶嘴時，適當的衛生至關重要。
The doctor provided advice on breastfeeding and nipple care. 醫生提供了關於母乳餵養與乳頭護理的建議。

meaning: 苦徹底止息；藉由證悟空性而獲得的極樂境界；開明的經驗。
sentences: The term nirvana refers to complete cessation of dukkha; a blissful state attained through realization of sunyata; enlightened experience. 涅槃一詞是指苦的完全停止。透過證悟空性而獲得的極樂境界；開明的經驗。
The lesson introduced nirvana as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了涅槃這個術語，它是一個易於理解的有用術語。
The term nitrate refers to any salt or ester of nitric acid. 術語硝酸鹽是指硝酸的任何鹽或酯。
The lesson introduced nitrate as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了硝酸鹽作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
Nitro compounds tend to be unstable and often explosive. 硝基化合物往往不穩定且經常爆炸。
Something described as nitro is containing the nitro group. 被描述為硝基的物質含有硝基。

meaning: 原子序數為7、原子量為14.0067的化學元素。它是一種無色無味的氣體。
sentences: By molar fraction, nitric oxide contains equal parts nitrogen and oxygen. 按摩爾分數計算，一氧化氮含有等量的氮和氧。
The term nitrogen refers to the chemical element with an atomic number of 7 and atomic weight of 14.0067. It is a colorless and odorless gas. 術語氮是指原子序為7、原子量為14.0067的化學元素。它是一種無色無味的氣體。
No, I haven't seen your keys anywhere. 不，我到處都沒看到你的鑰匙。
There is no doubt that technology has changed our lives. 毫無疑問，科技改變了我們的生活。

meaning: 貴族或特權社會階層，歷史上伴隨著世襲頭銜；貴族制。
sentences: The castle was once home to the Scottish nobility. 這座城堡曾經是蘇格蘭貴族的住所。
Titles of nobility were passed down through generations. 貴族頭銜代代相傳。
He was highly respected for his noble character and good deeds. 他因其高尚的（高貴）品格與善行而深受尊敬。
The ancient palace is a magnificent structure of noble design. 那座古代宮殿是一座設計大方（高貴）的宏偉建築。

meaning: 一個同伴；貴族；等級從男爵到國王到皇帝。
sentences: The term nobleman refers to a peer; an aristocrat; ranks range from baron to king to emperor. 貴族一詞指的是同儕；貴族；等級範圍從男爵到國王到皇帝。
The lesson introduced nobleman as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了貴族這個術語，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。
Nobody was at home when I rang the door bell. 我按門鈴時，家裡沒人。
Nobody knows what the future holds, so live in the moment. 沒人知道未來會如何，所以活在當下。
nocturnal birds 夜行鳥
Something described as nocturnal is primarily active during the night. 被描述為夜間活動的生物主要在夜間活動。
She nodded her head in agreement with the manager's proposal. 她點了點頭，表示同意經理的提案。
The old man gave a gentle nod to the passing stranger. 那位老人對路過的陌生人輕輕點了點頭。
The term node refers to a knot, knob, protuberance or swelling. 術語「結」是指結、旋鈕、突起或腫脹。
The lesson introduced node as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了節點作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 一種起源於中世紀的讚美詩或頌歌，為紀念基督的誕生而唱；聖誕頌歌。
sentences: The term noel refers to a kind of hymn, or canticle, of mediaeval origin, sung in honor of the birth of Christ; a Christmas carol. 「諾埃爾」一詞指的是一種起源於中世紀的讚美詩或頌歌，為紀念基督的誕生而演唱。一首聖誕頌歌。
The lesson introduced noel as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 noel 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 黑色電影的或與之相關的，或與該類型相關的氛圍。
sentences: Something described as noir is of or pertaining to film noir, or the atmosphere associated with that genre. 被描述為黑色的事物屬於或屬於黑色電影，或與該類型相關的氛圍。
The word noir is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 黑色這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
The loud noise from the construction site was very annoying. 建築工地傳來的巨大噪音非常令人討厭。
Did you hear that strange noise coming from the attic? 你聽到閣樓傳來的那聲怪響了嗎？
The restaurant was so noisy that we could hardly hear each other. 餐廳太吵了，我們幾乎聽不見對方說話。
My neighbors are often very noisy late at night. 我的鄰居深夜經常很吵鬧。

meaning: 一個社會或階級的成員，他們在沒有固定住所的情況下將動物從一個牧場放牧到另一個牧場。
sentences: The term nomad refers to a member of a society or class who herd animals from pasture to pasture with no fixed home. 遊牧一詞指的是一個社會或階級的成員，他們在沒有固定住所的情況下將動物從一個牧場放牧到另一個牧場。
The lesson introduced nomad as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 nomad 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用於形成特定藝術或科學領域的名稱或術語的一組規則。
sentences: The term nomenclature refers to A set of rules used for forming the names or terms in a particular field of arts or sciences. 術語命名法是指用於形成特定藝術或科學領域的名稱或術語的一組規則。
The lesson introduced nomenclature as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了術語作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用作名稱的數字（通常是自然數字）；數字代碼或識別碼。 （參見維基百科上的標稱數字。）。
sentences: Numeric codes of characters used in programming are nominals. 程式設計中使用的字元的數字代碼是名目值。
The term nominal refers to a number (usually natural) used like a name; a numeric code or identifier. (See nominal number on Wikipedia.). 術語「名目」是指像名稱一樣使用的數字（通常是自然數字）；數字代碼或識別碼。 （參見維基百科上的標稱數字。）。

meaning: 以名義上的方式；名義上。
sentences: If someone acts nominally, they do so in a way that is in a nominal manner; in name only. 如果某人名義上行事，他們會以名義上的方式這樣做；只是名義上的。
The speaker responded nominally during the discussion. 發言者在討論期間進行了名義上的回應。
The committee decided to nominate her for the position of senior manager. 委員會決定提名她擔任高級經理一職。
Several famous actors were nominated for an Academy Award this year. 幾位著名的演員在今年獲得了奧斯卡獎的提名。
His nomination for the Nobel Peace Prize was a major honor for his country. 他獲得諾貝爾和平獎的提名是他國家的巨大榮譽。
The nomination process for the new committee members will start next week. 新委員會成員的提名過程將於下週開始。
The nominees for the award attended a special ceremony in the city center. 該獎項的獲提名人出席了在市中心舉行的特別典禮。
The company announced the list of nominees for the new board of directors. 公司公佈了新任董事會成員的被提名者名單。
The charity is a non-profit organization that helps children in need. 該慈善機構是一個幫助有需要兒童的非營利組織。
The center provides free legal services on a non-profit basis. 該中心以非營利方式提供免費法律服務。
The rain was non-stop for three days. 雨連續下了三天沒停過。
We took a non-stop flight from New York to London. 我們搭乘從紐約直飛倫敦的航班。
None of the students managed to solve the difficult problem. 沒有一位學生設法解決那個難題。
I have none of the information you are looking for. 我沒有任何你要找的資訊。
"Hrunk" is a nonexistent word. 「Hrunk」是一個不存在的字。
His social skills are nonexistent: he chewed with his mouth open all through dinner. 他的社交技巧根本不存在：整個晚餐他都張著嘴咀嚼。

meaning: 旨在提供事實或真實事物和事件的真實描述的書面作品。常用作定語。
sentences: Encyclopedias, how-to manuals and biographies are all considered nonfiction and so are kept in the nonfiction section. 百科全書、操作手冊和傳記都被視為非小說類書籍，因此保留在非小說類書籍部分。
The term nonfiction refers to written works intended to give facts, or true accounts of real things and events. Often used attributively. 非小說一詞是指旨在提供事實或真實事物和事件的真實描述的書面作品。常用於定語。

meaning: 不穩定且不可預測；傾向於來回跳躍。
sentences: a film with a nonlinear plot 一部具有非線性情節的電影
Something described as nonlinear is erratic and unpredictable; tending to jump back and forth. 被描述為非線性的事物是不穩定且不可預測的；傾向於來回跳躍。
The local charity is a nonprofit organization that helps children in need. 當地這家慈善機構是一家幫助有需要孩子的非營利組織。
She decided to dedicate her career to working for a nonprofit foundation. 她決定致力於為一家非營利基金會工作。
Don't listen to office gossip; it's mostly complete nonsense. 不要聽信辦公室的閒言碎語；那大多完全是胡說八道（廢話）。
His explanation for being late earlier managing to be absolute nonsense. 他剛才對遲到的解釋竟然（能）是徹頭徹尾的胡言亂語（廢話）。

meaning: 不停歇；沒有中斷或中斷。
sentences: There's a nonstop flight to Mauritius, but I'm not sitting on the same plane for thirteen hours. 有直飛毛里求斯的航班，但我不會在同一架飛機上坐十三個小時。
Something described as nonstop is without stopping; without interruption or break. 所謂不間斷，就是沒有停止；沒有中斷或中斷。
Taiwan is famous for its delicious and savory beef noodles. 台灣以其美味可口的牛肉麵聞名。
I usually have a quick bowl of instant noodles for lunch. 我通常中午快速吃一碗泡麵。

meaning: 兩堵牆形成的小角落；一個凹室。
sentences: There was a small broom for sweeping ash kept in the nook between the fireplace bricks and the wall. 壁爐磚和牆壁之間的角落放著一把小掃帚，用來掃灰。
The term nook refers to A small corner formed by two walls; an alcove. 角落一詞是指由兩面牆形成的小角落；一個凹室。
The sun is strongest at noon when it's directly overhead. 中午太陽最強烈，就在頭頂正上方。
Let's meet for lunch at noon in front of the museum. 我們中午在博物館門口碰面吃午餐吧。
She can speak neither French nor Spanish fluently. 她既不會說法語，也不會流利地說西班牙語。
I am not hungry, nor am I particularly thirsty right now. 我不餓，現在也不特別渴。
Working from home has become the norm for many employees recently. 遠端辦公在最近已成為許多員工的常態（規範）。
It is important to understand the social norms and customs of other cultures. 了解其他文化的社會規範和習俗非常重要。

meaning: 用於測量直角的正方形。
sentences: The term norma refers to a square for measuring right angles. 術語法線是指用於測量直角的正方形。
The lesson introduced norma as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「常態」這個術語，它是一個需要理解的有用術語。
It's perfectly normal to feel nervous before an important job interview. 重要面試前感到緊張是完全正常的。
The temperature returned to normal after the heavy rain stopped. 大雨停後，氣溫恢復了正常。

meaning: 正常或平常的狀態；常態。
sentences: Jessie was going to wear pants to school, but her brother persuaded her to wear shorts to preserve normality. 傑西本來打算穿褲子去學校，但她哥哥說服她穿短褲以保持正常。
The term normality refers to The state of being normal or usual; normalcy. 術語「正常」是指正常或平常的狀態；常態。

meaning: 使正常，與既定標準一致。
sentences: There is little hope that the two countries will normalize relations; their governments seem to hate each other and would just as soon stay on bad terms. 兩國關係正常化的希望渺茫；他們的政府似乎互相憎恨，並且很快就會保持不和。
People often normalize when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們通常會恢復正常。

meaning: 在正常條件或情況下；通常;大部分時間。
sentences: Normally, I eat breakfast at 6am, but today, I got up late and didn't eat until 9. 平常我早上6點吃早餐，但今天我起晚了，直到9點才吃東西。
If someone acts normally, they do so in a way that is under normal conditions or circumstances; usually; most of the time. 如果某人行為正常，則他們是在正常條件或情況下這樣做的；通常;大多數時候。
normative behaviour 規範行為
Something described as normative is conforming to a norm or norms. 被描述為規範的事物是指符合一個或多個規範。
Taipei is located in the north of Taiwan. 台北位於台灣北部。
The birds are flying north for the summer. 鳥兒正向北飛去度夏。

meaning: 朝北方向行駛或移動；或設計為向北行駛的基礎設施。
sentences: She will leave on the northbound bus. 她将乘坐北行巴士离开。
There are roadworks on the northbound carriageway. 北行车道正在进行道路施工。

meaning: 位於東北方向或方向；東北；東北風。
sentences: a northeast course 東北航線
Something described as northeast is situated toward or in the direction of the northeast; northeastward; northeasterly. 被描述為東北的事物位於東北方向或方向；東北；東北風。

meaning: 屬於、與東北有關、位於或來自東北。
sentences: Something described as northeastern is of, related to, located in, or from the northeast. 被描述為東北的事物屬於東北、與東北有關、位於東北或來自東北。
The word northeastern is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 東北這個詞常用來形容人、事物或情況。
Taipei is located in the northern part of Taiwan. 台北位於台灣的北部地區。
Many northern European countries have a high standard of living. 許多北歐國家擁有很高的生活水準。
Alaska is the northernmost American state. 阿拉斯加是美國 最北端 的州。 阿拉斯加是美國最北端的州。 阿拉斯加是美國最北端的州。
The report describes the result as northernmost. 報告將結果描述為最北。 報告將結果描述為最北。 報告將結果描述為最北。

meaning: 位於或指向北方；向北移動或面向北。
sentences: Something described as northward is situated or directed towards the north; moving or facing towards the north. 被描述為向北的事物位於或指向北方；移動或面向北方。
The word northward is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 向北這個字常用來形容人、事或情況。

meaning: 位於西北方向或朝向西北方向；西北；西北風。
sentences: a northwest course 西北航線
Something described as northwest is situated toward or in the direction of the northwest; northwestward; northwesterly. 被描述為西北的事物位於西北或朝向西北的方向；西北；西北風。

meaning: 屬於或關於西北的；從或到某個方向。
sentences: Brittany is located in northwestern France. 布列塔尼位於法國西北部。
Something described as northwestern is of or pertaining to the northwest; from or to in such a direction. 被描述為西北的事物屬於或屬於西北；從或到這樣的方向。
He has a prominent nose just like his father. 他有個像他父親一樣挺拔的鼻子。
The dog followed its nose to find the hidden treat. 狗憑嗅覺找到了藏起來的零食。
He got a sudden nosebleed after the match. 比賽後他突然流鼻血了。
Lean forward and pinch your nose to stop a nosebleed. 身體前傾並捏住鼻子以止住鼻血。
The old songs filled him with a sense of nostalgia. 老歌讓他心中充滿了懷舊之情。
She looked back on her childhood with nostalgia and warmth. 她帶著懷舊與溫暖回憶起童年。
Listening to the music made her feel nostalgic for her college days. 聽這音樂讓她懷念起大學時代。
He gave a nostalgic account of his travels across the country. 他對自己環遊全國的旅程做了一番懷舊的描述。
The sweet scent of fresh jasmine filled her nostrils as she entered the room. 新鮮茉莉花的甜美香味在她進入房間時撲鼻而來（進入鼻孔）。
The doctor examined the patient's nostrils to look for any signs of infection. 醫生檢查了病人的鼻孔，尋找是否有感染跡象。

meaning: 對他人的事打聽、好奇或好奇；傾向於窺探或乾涉。
sentences: They built tall fences, yet the nosy neighbors always seemed to know everything about them. 他們築起高高的柵欄，但愛管閒事的鄰居似乎總是知道他們的一切。
The report describes the result as nosy. 報告稱這項結果令人八卦。
It is not raining today, so we can go for a picnic. 今天沒下雨，所以我們可以去野餐。
I am not sure if I can attend the meeting tomorrow. 我不確定明天是否能參加會議。
There has been a notable improvement in her health since she started exercising. 自從她開始運動以來，她的健康狀況有了顯著的改善。
Several notable experts in the field attended the international conference. 該領域的幾位知名專家出席了這次國際會議。

meaning: 作為一個尖銳的例子；以顯著的方式。
sentences: If someone acts notably, they do so in a way that is as a pointed example; in a notable manner. 如果某人的行為引人注目，那麼他們的行為方式就是一個典型的例子；以一種值得注意的方式。
The speaker responded notably during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了引人注目的回應。

meaning: 公證員、準備、證明和證明文件、證人宣誓書和宣誓的法律執業者。
sentences: The term notary refers to a public notary, a legal practitioner who prepares, attests to, and certifies documents, witnesses affidavits, and administers oaths. 公證員一詞是指公證人，即準備、證明和認證文件、證人宣誓書和管理宣誓的法律執業者。
The lesson introduced notary as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了公證人作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 用這種符號寫成的特定註釋或訊息。
sentences: She made a notation in the margin of the book. 她在書的頁邊空白處做了記號。
The term notation refers to a specific note or piece of information written in such a notation. 術語「符號」是指以這種符號書寫的特定註釋或訊息。

meaning: 達到（某事）；增加某人的分數或成功記錄。
sentences: The team notched a pair of shutout wins on Sunday. 該隊在周日取得了兩場零封勝利。
To notch means to achieve (something); to add to one's score or record of successes. To notch 意味著實現（某事）；增加某人的分數或成功記錄。
Please take some notes during the lecture. 講座期間請做些筆記。
She left a short note on the fridge saying she'd be back late. 她在冰箱上留了張便條，說她會晚點回來。
I always carry a small notebook to write down my ideas. 我總是帶著一本小筆記本來寫下我的想法。
The student took detailed notes in her biology notebook. 學生在她的生物筆記本上做了詳細的筆記。

meaning: 以 聲譽 而聞名； 著名 ，<a rel="mw:WikiLink" href="/ticetle.
sentences: The report describes the result as noted. 該報告描述了所指出的結果。 該報告描述了所指出的結果。 該報告描述了所指出的結果。
Everyone noticed the noted tone of the message. 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。 每個人都注意到了這則訊息的語氣。 每個人都注意到了這些訊息的語氣。
Please jot down your phone number on this notepad. 請在記事本上寫下你的電話號碼。
He always carries a small notepad and pen in his pocket. 他書包裡總是帶著一個小記事本和一支筆。

meaning: 值得關注；值得注意的；值得注意。
sentences: Zukertort represent the other most noteworthy tournaments. Zukertort 代表了其他最值得注意的錦標賽。
Something described as noteworthy is deserving attention; notable; worthy of notice. 被描述為值得注意的事物是值得關注的；值得注意的；值得關注。
There is nothing in the fridge; we need to go shopping. 冰箱裡什麼都沒有，我們需要去買東西。
I have nothing to hide from my best friend. 我對我最好的朋友沒有什麼好隱瞞的。
Did you notice the change in the weather this afternoon? 你注意到今天下午天氣的變化了嗎？
The notice on the door said that the shop was closed for repairs. 門上的公告說這家店因裝修關閉。
There has been a noticeable improvement in her health since she started exercising. 自從她開始運動以來，她的健康狀況有了顯著的改善。
The scar on his forehead is hardly noticeable unless you look very closely. 他額頭上的傷疤幾乎看不出來，除非你非常仔細地看。

meaning: 達到可檢測的程度，足以引起注意。
sentences: It suddenly became noticeably cooler when the sun went behind a cloud. 當太陽躲到雲層後面時，天氣突然變得明顯涼爽。
If someone acts noticeably, they do so in a way that is to a detectable degree, sufficient to be noticed. 如果某人的行為引人注目，那麼他們的行為方式就達到了可察覺的程度，足以引起注意。

meaning: 系統或應用程式顯示的訊息、警報或訊號，用於通知使用者事件、更新、新訊息等。
sentences: A notification popped up on my computer. 我的電腦上彈出一則通知。
I received an e-mail notification on my phone. 我的手機上收到了一封電子郵件通知。
The airline will notify the passengers of any changes to the flight schedule. 航空公司將通知乘客有關航班時刻表的任何變動。
Please notify the office immediately if you lose your membership card. 如果您丟失了會員卡，請立即通知辦公室。
He has a very traditional notion of what a family should look like. 他對家庭應有的樣子有著非常傳統的觀念。
I had a sudden notion to travel around the world after graduating. 大學畢業後，我突然萌生了環遊世界的想法。

meaning: 臭名昭著 或 臭名昭著 聲譽 。
sentences: The term notoriety refers to An infamous or notorious condition or reputation. 惡名昭彰一詞是指 臭名昭著 或 假冒> 聲譽 。 臭名昭著一詞是指臭名昭著或臭名昭著的狀況或聲譽。 惡名昭彰是指臭名昭彰作品或假冒>藝術品。
The lesson introduced notoriety as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了「惡名」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「惡名」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。 本課介紹了「惡名」作為一個需要理解的有用術語。

He is a notorious liar, and nobody believes anything he says anymore. 他是個出名的（惡名昭彰）騙子，再也沒人相信他說的話。

meaning: 以臭名昭著或引人注目的方式；眾所周知。
sentences: If someone acts notoriously, they do so in a way that is in a notorious or notable manner; as is commonly known. 如果某人的行為臭名昭著，則他們以臭名昭著或引人注目的方式這樣做；眾所周知。
The speaker responded notoriously during the discussion. 演講者在討論中做出了臭名昭著的回應。
He, notwithstanding, persisted in his inquiries. 儘管如此，他還是堅持詢問。
The team responded notwithstanding to the change. 儘管發生了變化，團隊還是做出了回應。
A noun is a word that represents a person, place, or thing. 名詞是代表人物、地點或事物的詞。
In the sentence 'The cat is sleeping', 'cat' is a noun. 在句子 'The cat is sleeping' 中，'cat' 是個名詞。
Eating a healthy diet is essential to nourish your body and maintain energy. 健康飲食對於滋養身體和維持能量至關重要。
The program aims to provide emotional nourishment and support to children. 該計畫旨在為孩子提供情感上的滋養（支持）。
The soil provides essential nourishment for the plants. 土壤為植物提供必需的營養。
Poor children need better nourishment to grow healthy and strong. 貧困兒童需要更好的營養才能健康強壯地成長。

meaning: 以前不顯眼的恆星突然變亮。
sentences: The term nova refers to any sudden brightening of a previously inconspicuous star. 新星一詞指的是以前不顯眼的恆星突然變亮。
The lesson introduced nova as a useful term to understand. 本課程介紹了 nova 作為一個易於理解的有用術語。
I'm reading a very interesting novel about space exploration. 我正在讀一本關於太空探索的有趣小說。
The novel was adapted into a highly successful television drama. 這部小說被改編成一部非常成功的電視劇。
She is a world-famous novelist who has written several bestsellers. 她是一位世界聞名的、寫過幾本暢銷書的小說家。
The novelist spent several years researching for her latest historical book. 這位小說家花了幾年時間為她最新的歷史著作進行研究。
The term novella refers to a short novel or long short story. 中篇小說一詞指的是短篇小說或長篇短篇小說。
The lesson introduced novella as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了中篇小說作為一個易於理解的有用術語。

meaning: 在常見家居用品的設計中，通常尺寸大得不切實際，主要用於展示而不是功能使用。
sentences: My novelty calculator works fine but it hurts my hands to press the keys. 我的新奇計算器工作正常，但按鍵時我的手很痛。

Something described as novelty is in the design of a common household item, often impractically large, and meant primarily for display rather than functional use. 被描述為新穎的東西是在普通家居用品的設計中，通常大得不切實際，主要用於展示而不是功能使用。
Thanksgiving is celebrated in November in the United States. 感恩節在美國於十一月慶祝。
The weather begins to get cold in November. 十一月天氣開始變冷。
The course is designed for novices who have no previous experience in art. 該課程是為沒有藝術經驗的新手（初學者）設計的。
While he is still a novice, he shows a great deal of potential for growth. 雖然他還是個新手，但他展現出了巨大的成長潛力。
I'm sorry, but I'm busy right now; can I call you back? 抱歉，我現在很忙，可以等會兒再回電嗎？
Now is the best time to start learning a new language. 現在是開始學習新語言的最佳時機。
Technology has managed to change our lives significantly nowadays. 科技現今（如今）竟然顯著改變了我們的生活。
More and more people choose to work from home nowadays, truly. 現今（如今）越來越多的人選擇在家工作，真的。
I've looked everywhere for my keys, but they are nowhere to be found. 我到處找鑰匙，但哪裡都找不到。
The small village is located in the middle of nowhere, far from any city. 這個小村莊坐落在荒郊野外，遠離任何城市。
He attached a new nozzle to the garden hose. 他給花園水管裝了一個新噴嘴。
The rocket's nozzle was damaged during launch. 火箭的噴嘴在發射過程中損壞了。
Understanding the basics is easy, but appreciating the nuances takes years. 理解基礎知識很容易，但理解細微差別需要數年時間。
The term nuance refers to Subtlety or fine detail. 術語“細微差別”是指微妙或精細的細節。
Scientists are studying the potential of nuclear energy for future. 科學家正研究未來核（核）能的潛力。
The international treaty aims to limit the spread of nuclear arms. 國際條約旨在限制核子武器的擴散。
The nucleus of the atom contains protons and neutrons at its center. 原子核包含中心的質子和中子。
A small group of dedicated researchers formed the nucleus of the project. 一小群盡職的研究人員構成了該專案的核心（中心）。
The museum features a large collection of famous nude statues and paintings. 這家博物館收藏了大量著名的裸體雕像和繪畫。
She chose a pair of comfortable nude shoes that matched her skin tone. 她選了一雙與她膚色相配的舒適肉色鞋子。

meaning: 玩家選擇的水果機捲軸旋轉一步。
sentences: Since the machine was showing two lemons and a cherry, I decided to try a nudge. 由於機器顯示了兩個檸檬和一個櫻桃，我決定嘗試輕推。
The term nudge refers to the rotation by one step of a fruit machine reel of the player's choice. 術語「輕推」是指玩家選擇的水果機捲軸旋轉一步。

meaning: 身體不穿衣服的狀態或品質；具體來說，生殖器上不穿衣服的品質。
sentences: In places such as Scandinavia, public nudity is legal. 在斯堪的納維亞半島等地，公共場合裸體是合法的。
The term nudity refers to the state or quality of being without clothing on the body; specifically, the quality of being without clothing on the genitals. 裸體一詞是指身體不穿衣服的狀態或品質；具體來說，就是生殖器上不穿衣服的品質。
a gold nugget 一塊金塊
The term nugget refers to a small, compact chunk or clump. 術語“塊”是指小而緊湊的塊或塊。
The neighbor's dog barking throughout the night is a right nuisance - I'm going to complain. 鄰居的狗整夜狂吠真是令人討厭——我要投訴。
What a nuisance to have to go now! 現在必須走真是太麻煩了！
If a nuclear war ever breaks out, military facilities are likely to be nuked first. 如果核戰爆發，軍事設施很可能會先遭到核武攻擊。
To nuke means to use a nuclear weapon on (a target). 核武意味著對（目標）使用核武。

meaning: 沒有有效值的實體的屬性。
sentences: Since no date of birth was entered for the patient, his age is null. 由於沒有輸入患者的出生日期，因此他的年齡為空。
The term null refers to the attribute of an entity that has no valid value. 術語 null 指的是沒有有效值的實體屬性。
The contract has been nullified. 合約已無效。
People often nullify when the situation calls for it. 當情況需要時，人們常常會做出無效的決定。

meaning: 身體無法感覺，沒有感覺的力量。
sentences: fingers numb with cold 手指凍得麻木
legs numb from kneeling 跪著腿都麻了
Could you please give me your phone number? 你可以給我你的電話號碼嗎？
There are a large number of students in the library today. 今天圖書館裡有大量的學生。

meaning: 數量相同；因此，完全相同；相同的。
sentences: Something described as numerical is the same in number; hence, identically the same; identical. 被描述為數字的事物在數量上是相同的；因此，完全相同；完全相同的。
The word numerical is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 數字這個詞通常用來描述人、事物或情況。
The researchers conducted numerous experiments to test the theory. 研究人員進行了許多（很多的）實驗以測試該理論。
There are numerous reasons for choosing to study abroad in Japan. 選擇去日本留學有許多（很多的）原因。
The kind nun dedicated her entire life to helping poor children. 那位熱心的修女將一生致力於幫助貧困兒童。
She decided to become a nun and live a simple and spiritual life. 她決定成為一名修女，過簡單且具精神性的生活。
The kind nurse took great care of the elderly patients. 那位熱心的護士把老病患照顧得很好。
She is currently studying at university to become a nurse. 她目前正在大學唸書，準備當一名護士。
She works as a dedicated teacher at a local private nursery now. 她現在在當地的一家私立幼兒園（苗圃，指托兒所）擔任老師。
We visited a plant nursery to buy some fresh colorful flowers today. 我們今天逛了一家植物苗圃，買了一些繽紛的鮮花。

meaning: 處於哺乳期、哺乳期的狀態。
sentences: The nursing bear wouldn't move far until her cubs were older. 在幼崽長大之前，哺乳熊不會走得太遠。
The report describes the result as nursing. 報告將結果描述為護理。
Parents play a crucial role in nurturing the potential of their children. 父母在培育孩子潛力方面起著至關重要的作用。
The organization aims to nurture local artists and promote their work. 該組織旨在培育當地藝術家並推廣他們的作品。
Walnuts and almonds are healthy and delicious types of nuts. 核桃與杏仁是健康且美味的堅果種類。
He tightened the nut with a wrench to fix the loose bolt. 他用扳手擰緊螺帽，以固定鬆掉的螺栓。
Nutmeg is a popular spice used in baking and cooking. 肉豆蔻是烘焙和烹飪中常用的熱門香料。
She added a pinch of ground nutmeg to the eggnog. 她在蛋奶酒中加了一撮肉豆蔻粉。
Fruits and vegetables are packed with essential nutrients for your body. 水果 and 蔬菜富含身體所需的必需養分。
Plants absorb nutrients and water from the soil through their roots. 植物通過根部從土壤中吸收養分和水分。
Good nutrition is essential for children's physical and mental development. 良好的營養對於兒童的身心發展至關重要。
The athlete pays great attention to her nutrition and daily diet. 這位運動員非常注意她的營養和日常飲食。

meaning: 屬於、關於或提供營養的。
sentences: Something described as nutritional is of, pertaining to, or providing nutrition. 被描述為營養的東西是屬於、關於或提供營養的。
The word nutritional is often used to describe a person, thing, or situation. 營養這個詞常用來形容一個人、一件事或一種情況。
Fresh fruit and vegetables provide a healthy and nutritious diet. 新鮮水果和蔬菜提供健康且有營養的（有營養的）飲食。
It is important to ensure that children get nutritious meals daily. 確保孩子們每天獲得營養豐富的餐點是很重要的。

meaning: 一艘小船；與大海相比被認為很小的船。
sentences: The term nutshell refers to a small boat; a boat considered small in comparison to the seas. 簡而言之，「小船」一詞是指小船。與海洋相比被認為很小的船。
The lesson introduced nutshell as a useful term to understand. 本課介紹了 簡而言之，這是一個需要理解的有用術語。

meaning: Barmy：古怪的，古怪的；瘋狂，瘋狂，瘋狂。
sentences: That student's parents seem to be nutty as a fruitcake. 那個學生的父母看起來就像個水果蛋糕一樣瘋狂。
The report describes the result as nutty. 報告稱這一結果非常瘋狂。
The jacket is made of high-quality nylon material. 這件夾克是由高品質尼龍材料製成的。
She bought a new pair of nylon stockings. 她買了一雙新的尼龍襪。
